definition:
σῖτος, -ου, ὁ 
 [in LXX chiefly for דָּגָן ;] 
wheat, corn: Mat.3:12 13:25, 29-30 Mrk.4:28, Luk.3:17 12:18 16:7 22:32, Jhn.12:24, Act.27:38, 1Co.15:37, Rev.6:6 18:13.†
 σιτίοι, -ου, τό 
 (dimin. of σῖτος), [in LXX: Pro.30:22 (לֶחֶם)* ;] 
  1. corn, grain: Act.7:12 (but see 131., § 9, 1). 
   2. Mostly in pl., σιτία, bread, food, provisions (LXX, l.with, Hdt., al.).†
 (AS)
